title: cuscuta reflexa var. anguina
intro: Cuscuta reflexa var. anguina, commonly known as Dodder, is a parasitic plant that attaches itself to other plants to obtain nutrients. The medicinal properties of Cuscuta reflexa var. anguina include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic properties. This plant has been used to improve fertility, reduce stress, and boost the immune system, resulting in several health benefits such as improved reproductive health and enhanced overall well-being. Cuscuta reflexa var. anguina is typically used in herbal preparations like capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
